generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex in guarantees
Use a type-level guarantee over visible ports, or an implementation-level assign when the left-hand side is a valid output
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar declaration types are int, real, and bool
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
irrelevant_topics: Compact requirement semantics and model traceability
